description:
- Improved hero detail abilities with transformation filtering, expandable details, and inline ability videos.
- Improved hero costumes with cleaner cards and quality rarity icons.
- Updated hero lore layout to match the requested structure with the app's UI style.
- Fixed ability filtering so shared abilities stay visible for heroes without form-specific mappings.
